items.html: These seven times are, in their general categories, four — they are the last five — for then a discernment of a name began in her, as above in the third discernment. Likewise, the fifth and sixth discernments are both one matter. Thus they are only four degrees, and they are the initials of Nekeva [female] — though not in the order of its letters — namely: Nun, Naarah; Kuf, Ktana [minor]; Bet, Bogeret [mature]; Hey, the Hey of HaVaYaH, as above. This is the reason a woman is called Nekeva: as an allusion to these four times, implied in its letters.
